name: autonomous-audit
description: Self-auditing autonomous loop pattern. Every cycle produces verifiable attestations, traces, and governance reports.

capabilities.cycle_attestation: Every 30-min cycle produces signed attestation with proof hash
capabilities.trace_persistence: RunTrace JSON per execution with all step metrics
capabilities.governance_audit: GCR (Governance Compliance Rate) computed and logged per cycle
capabilities.anomaly_detection: Flag cycles with degraded metrics (F1 < 90%, latency > threshold)
capabilities.daily_summary: Aggregate daily: cycles completed, attestations, failures, Z3 proofs
capabilities.memory_curation: Learned patterns extracted to persistent MEMORY.md (not ephemeral)

rules: 216+ cycles already completed — never reset the counter
Every attestation must include keccak256 proof hash
Audit logs are append-only JSONL — never delete
Daily summary posted to dashboard and audit trail
